color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 0: Load Conversation History
Build Structured Memory Context

div.style: color: rgb(183, 28, 28) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stage 1: Input Guardrails
Injection + PII Detection

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 2: Query Rewriting
LLM resolves pronouns and references

div.style: color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 3: Intent Classification
LLM assigns intent + domain relevance

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stage 5: Planning
LLM decomposes into sub-goals

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 7: Multi-Agent
Specialist sub-loops (4 iter each)
+ Synthesis LLM call

div.style: color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stage 6: ReACT Loop
Think-Act-Observe cycles
(up to 8 iterations)

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stage 8: Response Framing
LLM polishes answer

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 9: Reflection
Evaluate + Refine (up to 2 cycles)

div.style: color: rgb(183, 28, 28) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stage 11: Reflexion
Store learning if score < 0.7
